adminMain.step1Description: On the left is navigation between sections. We’ll start with the basics: projects → create → edit.
adminMain.step2Description: Here you create and manage projects. One project = one building or residential complex with a list of apartments or units.
adminMain.step3Description: Typical path: create a project → import data → configure the project → embed the widget or connect integrations.
adminMain.step4Description: In this section you’ll find requests, statuses, and links to projects and your CRM.
adminMain.step5Description: Widgets are for embedding on your site or in a CRM to show layouts and availability status.
adminMain.step6Description: Referral links, clients, stats, and earnings live here.
adminMain.step7Description: If something is unclear, tap here — we’ll respond quickly.
adminMain.step8Description: Click “Create project”. When the modal opens, the next tour about import and project creation will start automatically.

projectCreation.phase1KindDescription: اختر التخطيط الذي يناسب تطويرك. يمكنك تعديل التفاصيل لاحقًا في المحرر. انقر على بطاقة للمتابعة.
projectCreation.phase1Step1Description: Choose a path: quick import from a file (recommended) or manual setup.
projectCreation.phase1Step2Description: Import creates the project and loads apartments or units from your file automatically.
projectCreation.phase1Step3Description: Download the demo file and import it — you’ll walk through the full flow on real sample data.
projectCreation.phase1Step4Description: Choose and upload the demo file (e.g. Demo_chess_import.csv). When processing finishes, column mapping opens. Press Next to continue the tour there.
projectCreation.phase2ProjectTypeDescription: For the demo, choose Building (apartments). Press Next and we’ll set it for you.
projectCreation.phase2MappingOverviewDescription: Open each dropdown and match fields to columns from your file. Fill every row marked as required.
projectCreation.phase2MapApartmentDescription: In Number, pick the column that contains apartment numbers (e.g. Number).
projectCreation.phase2MapFloorDescription: In Floor, pick the column with floor values (e.g. Floor).
projectCreation.phase2MapRoomsDescription: In Rooms, pick the column with room counts (e.g. Count room).
projectCreation.phase2MapAreaDescription: In Area, pick the column with areas (e.g. Area).
projectCreation.phase2MapPriceDescription: In Price, pick the column with full price (e.g. Price Full).
projectCreation.phase2MapStatusDescription: In Status, pick the column with availability/status (e.g. status).
projectCreation.phase2ValidationDescription: Resolve any unknown values shown here, then finish the import with the button below.
projectCreation.phase2CreateDescription: When everything is valid, confirm and create the project to complete the import.

partners.nonPartnerIntroDescription: ادعُ العملاء واكسب من الإحالات ودعم العملاء — كل ذلك من مكان واحد.
partners.nonPartnerBecomeDescription: أنشئ ملفك كشريك في دقيقة تقريبًا — اضغط هذا الزر عندما تكون جاهزًا.
partners.partnerOverviewDescription: الدخل، التحويل، مستوى الشريك والإجراءات السريعة في هذا التبويب.
partners.partnerReferralsTabDescription: رابط التسجيل للعملاء هنا. يمكنك إضافة وسوم UTM للتحليلات.
partners.partnerCopyLinkDescription: انسخ الرابط وأرسله للعميل — يتم احتساب النقرات والتسجيلات تلقائيًا.
partners.partnerUtmDescription: فعّل منشئ UTM لمعرفة مصادر الزيارات (تيليجرام، يوتيوب وغيرها).
partners.partnerClientsTabDescription: العملاء تحت الدعم: ادعهم وافتح مساحة عملهم من هنا.
partners.partnerAccountTabDescription: الرصيد، المعاملات وسحب الأموال في قسم الحساب.

projectEditor.step1Description: On the left are the project settings sections. We’ll walk through the main ones so you can find what you need quickly.
projectEditor.step2Description: Project name, address, type, and basic parameters.
projectEditor.step3Description: Edit areas, prices, statuses, and the list of units here.
projectEditor.step4Description: Add floor plans and markup so clients see an interactive layout.
projectEditor.step5Description: Upload photos shown in cards and in the widget.
projectEditor.step6Description: Add your own fields (building, finishing, etc.) and control how they appear.
projectEditor.step7Description: Link a domain or subdomain for the public page or widget.
projectEditor.step8Description: Save after edits — especially after uploads and bulk operations.
